stemHtml: An aircraft experiencing radio communication failure on an IFR flight in IMC should…

options.a: divert to the most suitable aerodrome according to the route of flight.
options.b: execute a VMC approach at the nearest suitable aerodrome.
options.c: proceed to an area from where the flight can be continued according to the visual flight rules.
options.d: proceed in accordance with the current flight plan to the designated navigation aid serving the destination aerodrome.
